name: Melting Depravity
descrip: Cast a charm on your opponent.
outcome: A sinful pulse of magic radiates out from the trio of gooey women while they purr and giggle in sultry amusement, each sweetly cascading wave of dark magic shivering through your senses, arousing euphoria irresistibly oozing down through you until it settles into your eagerly throbbing manhood.
miss: A sinful pulse of magic radiates out from the trio of gooey women while they purr and giggle in sultry amusement, each sweetly cascading wave of dark magic shivering through your senses, but manage to resist the sinful spell!
statusOutcome: The depraved charm magic echoes in your head on loop as you gaze thoughtlessly at Dark Perpetua's many soft and inviting curves, each of the three temptingly sliding their hands over the others, the invitation to ruin aching in your very core...
